modelName: Mineral B Carbon Steel Frying Pan - 32cm
description: The De Buyer Mineral B 32cm Frying Pan is the definitive choice for professional high-heat cooking. This variant is uniquely finished with organic beeswax, which protects the carbon steel from oxidation and jumpstarts the seasoning process. Its heavy-duty 3mm thick construction ensures exceptional heat retention for perfect searing and caramelisation. Included in this variant is the iconic French-curved riveted handle and a signature bee-stamped cooking surface. As technical cookware, it requires initial seasoning but develops a superior, chemical-free non-stick patina that improves with every professional service.
features: Material: 99% Iron / 1% Carbon steel; Thickness: 3mm; Weight: 2.7kg; Finish: Organic beeswax (oxidation protection and seasoning aid); Handle: Riveted epoxy-coated steel with French curvature; Thermal Compatibility: Oven safe up to 200°C for 10 minutes (flash use only); Heat Sources: Induction, Gas, Electric, Ceramic; Performance: High thermal retention for Maillard reaction and caramelisation.
uses: High-heat searing of steaks and chops, browning vegetables, grilling, and frying.
name: De Buyer Mineral B Carbon Steel Frying Pan - 32cm
